name: scene_nodes_add_port_phase_a1.experimental
description: EXPERIMENTAL — narrowly-scoped Phase A.1 test of the C++ shim's AddPort wrapper. Creates a fresh FIO_Probe SN Generator with one Floating IO node, calls scene_nodes_add_floating_io_port to add a named port, then verifies the port shows up via direct GetInputs/GetOutputs walk. Phase B (NodeTemplate publishing) covers AM-param surfacing and is out of scope here. Per GPT discipline: prove the named-port creation primitive works in isolation BEFORE testing AM exposure or larger workflows. Requires cpp_shim built + installed + C4D restarted (verify via scene_nodes_helper_ping returning helper_loaded=True before running this).

args.script:
import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['FIO_Probe']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('phase A.1 setup ok')

import c4d
import maxon
from maxon.frameworks.nodes import GraphDescription
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
gen = c4d.BaseObject(180420700)
gen.SetName('FIO_Probe')
doc.InsertObject(gen)
c4d.EventAdd()
g = GraphDescription.GetGraph(gen)
result = GraphDescription.ApplyDescription(g, [{'$type': 'Floating IO', '$name': 'fio_top'}])
# Find the floatingio instance ID for the test
fio_id = None
for c in (g.GetRoot().GetChildren() or []):
    cid = str(c.GetId())
    if cid.split('/')[-1].startswith('floatingio@') and '/' not in cid:
        fio_id = cid; break
if not fio_id: raise RuntimeError('no top-level floatingio created')
print(f'FIO_Probe created with fio_id={fio_id}')

import c4d
import maxon
from maxon.frameworks.nodes import GraphDescription
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
gen = doc.SearchObject('FIO_Probe')
g = GraphDescription.GetGraph(gen)
fio = None
for c in (g.GetRoot().GetChildren() or []):
    cid = str(c.GetId())
    if cid.split('/')[-1].startswith('floatingio@') and '/' not in cid:
        fio = c; break
if not fio: raise RuntimeError('floatingio not found')
ins_before = list(fio.GetInputs().GetChildren() or [])
outs_before = list(fio.GetOutputs().GetChildren() or [])
print(f'BASELINE inputs={len(ins_before)}, outputs={len(outs_before)}')
for p in ins_before: print(f'  in:  {str(p.GetId()).split(chr(60))[-1]}')
for p in outs_before: print(f'  out: {str(p.GetId()).split(chr(62))[-1]}')

import c4d
import maxon
from maxon.frameworks.nodes import GraphDescription
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
gen = doc.SearchObject('FIO_Probe')
g = GraphDescription.GetGraph(gen)
fio = None
for c in (g.GetRoot().GetChildren() or []):
    cid = str(c.GetId())
    if cid.split('/')[-1].startswith('floatingio@') and '/' not in cid:
        fio = c; break
if not fio: raise RuntimeError('floatingio not found')
ins_after = list(fio.GetInputs().GetChildren() or [])
found_target = None
for p in ins_after:
    pid = str(p.GetId())
    if 'com.sdimaging.test.myparam' in pid:
        found_target = pid; break
if not found_target:
    print(f'FAIL: hiddenin1.com.sdimaging.test.myparam port NOT found. Inputs:')
    for p in ins_after: print(f'  {str(p.GetId())}')
    raise AssertionError('AddPort did not land')
print(f'PASS: new port found -> {found_target}')
print(f'Total inputs after AddPort: {len(ins_after)}')

import c4d
import maxon
from maxon.frameworks.nodes import GraphDescription
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
gen = doc.SearchObject('FIO_Probe')
g = GraphDescription.GetGraph(gen)
fio = None
for c in (g.GetRoot().GetChildren() or []):
    cid = str(c.GetId())
    if cid.split('/')[-1].startswith('floatingio@') and '/' not in cid:
        fio = c; break
if not fio: raise RuntimeError('floatingio not found')
outs_after = list(fio.GetOutputs().GetChildren() or [])
found_target = None
for p in outs_after:
    pid = str(p.GetId())
    if 'com.sdimaging.test.myparam' in pid:
        found_target = pid; break
if not found_target:
    print(f'FAIL: in1.com.sdimaging.test.myparam port NOT found. Outputs:')
    for p in outs_after: print(f'  {str(p.GetId())}')
    raise AssertionError('AddPort (output side) did not land')
print(f'PASS: new output port found -> {found_target}')
print(f'Total outputs after AddPort: {len(outs_after)}')

import c4d
doc = c4d.documents.GetActiveDocument()
for n in ['FIO_Probe']:
    o = doc.SearchObject(n)
    if o: o.Remove()
c4d.EventAdd()
print('phase A.1 teardown ok')
